name: Petal 2 Visa

welcome_offer.description: No welcome bonus. Earn cash back through Petal Offers at select merchants.

earning_rates.notes: Earn 2% to 10% cash back at select merchants through Petal Offers
1% cash back on all purchases to start
1.25% cash back after 6 consecutive on-time monthly payments
1.5% cash back after 12 consecutive on-time monthly payments (max rate)

other_benefits.name: Credit building
other_benefits.description: Reports to all three major credit bureaus; strong on-time payment history builds credit

other_benefits.name: No fees — ever
other_benefits.description: Unlike the Petal 1, the Petal 2 charges NO fees of any kind for new cardholders — no annual fee, no foreign transaction fees, no late fees, no account fees

other_benefits.name: Credit limit increase path
other_benefits.description: Automatic review for credit limit increases with responsible use

notes: Petal 2 is Petal's flagship no-fee credit builder card. Unlike Petal 1, it has NO fees of any kind for new cardholders. Earns 1% cash back initially, increasing to 1.25% after 6 on-time payments and 1.5% after 12 on-time payments — making it one of the best flat-rate cash back rates among secured/no-credit-required cards. Variable APR: 28.24%–33.24%. Petal uses bank account cash flow data (rather than credit score alone) for approvals. Highly regarded among credit-builder cards.
